data.title: Chinese Publishing Industry Showcases Global Vision and Forges Deeper Ties at 2026 London Book Fair
data.description: On March 12, 2026, the 2026 London Book Fair concluded at Olympia London, serving as a significant global platform for Chinese publishers to present their recent accomplishments. This event, considered one of the premier publishing gatherings worldwide, attracted a large audience and facilitated the exchange of ideas among industry professionals.

data.title: Skanska constructs new building on campus in College Station, Texas, USA for USD 165M, about SEK 1.5 billion
data.description: Skanska, a construction company, has recently secured a deal to build a Biology Teaching & Research facility at The Texas A&M University System in College Station, Texas, USA. The contract, valued at USD 165 million (approximately SEK 1.5 billion), marks a significant collaboration with the university. This project signifies a continued partnership between both entities, showcasing Skanska's expertise in the construction industry.

data.title: Full year results and investor presentation have been announced, revealing key data and financial numbers.
data.description: In a recent update, it was reported that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.8% in the last quarter, which marks a significant decrease from the previous quarter's rate of 5.5%. This decrease translates to approximately 700,000 fewer people being unemployed. The data also shows that the economy has added 350,000 new jobs in various sectors. Additionally, the GDP growth rate for the same period was reported at 6.2%, reflecting a robust economic performance. These numbers indicate a positive trend in the labor market and overall economic stability.

data.title: Egide - US operations to be centralized at the Egide USA site (Cambridge, Maryland)
data.description: Today, Egide Groupe revealed plans to consolidate its manufacturing operations in the United States by moving all production activities to its Egide USA facility located in Cambridge, Maryland. This strategic decision will involve shifting operations from various sites across the country to the Cambridge location. This move is expected to streamline processes and improve efficiency within the company.

data.title: CORRECTION: Ignitis Group’s financial calendar 2026
data.description: Correction has been made to the expected Ex-Dividend Date for ordinary registered shares, now set for 8 April 2026 instead of the previously stated 7 April 2026. Additionally, the expected Dividend Record Date for ordinary registered shares has been rescheduled to 9 April 2026 from the initial 8 April 2026. AB "Ignitis grupė" has released its financial calendar for 2026, which includes the schedule for General Meetings of Shareholders.

data.title: Yes, There's Now a Harvard-Inspired Phone Case -- and It's Surprisingly Refined
data.description: Exploring the essence of authenticity, PITAKA unveils a new phone case design that honors the rich heritage and academic legacy of Harvard University. The intricately crafted case, launched on March 20, 2026, in CAMBRIDGE, England, encapsulates elements of the esteemed institution's history and visual symbolism. Through this unique creation, PITAKA bridges cultural traditions, embodying the values of truth and knowledge.

data.title: Dow Declines 200 Points, Falls For A Second Day: Fear & Greed Index Remains In 'Extreme Fear' Zone
data.description: The CNN Money Fear and Greed index showed a slight decrease in fear levels, though it remained in the "Extreme Fear" zone. On Thursday, U.S. stocks saw a decline, with the Dow Jones index falling by over 200 points for the second consecutive session. During a joint appearance with Japan's Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi at the White House, President Donald Trump mentioned Iran being "close to demolished" and suggested the situation would be resolved soon, stating that Kharg Island could be targeted if necessary. Accenture plc (NYSE: ACN) reported positive earnings for the second quarter and offered a cautious forecast. Additionally, Envela Corp (NYSE: ELA) saw a 31% surge in its shares following better-than-expected results. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.
